items.name: Agree block palette
items.subtitle: Test out and agree palette for housing and landmarks across Misthalin.

items.name: Download supporting mods
items.subtitle: Figure out exactly what we need to build this well. Adding WorldEdit + supporting packs (CUI).
items.what: 25/04: Identified WorldEdit mod builds compatible with conquest reforged and trialled in sandbox by building the wizard’s tower.

items.name: Identify foundation map
items.subtitle: Scout out different options for the foundation of Gielinor. Scan ProjectMC and forums for pre-designed terrain in WorldPainter.
items.what: 26/04: We’ve had a look at a few options for maps and found some great contenders. Major thanks to Nosferatu for the excellent foundations of their map design - we will be building from this 👍

items.name: Varrock square and rooftops
items.subtitle: Banks, streets, roofs, walls, market stalls, and the first dense city. To break up into smaller tickets.

images.caption: Current roof palette and street density test.

items.name: Lumbridge build
items.subtitle: Our first major build ticket! Foundations, castle walls, chapel, houses, paths, flora, graveyard and bridge.

images.caption: Completed castle-courtyard scale and path-width proof.
